base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tileset_breakable_blocks_per_zone — a tile (tile_atlas) from 1986 metroid. Breakable/hidden tiles — ~20 variants across zones. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Breakable/hidden tiles — ~20 variants across zones; look identical to regular walls until shot/bombed. Hide passages and items
